title: eragrostis propinqua
intro: Eragrostis propinqua, also known as native grass or black grass, is a perennial grass species native to Australia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Eragrostis propinqua include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or powder, and is often used in traditional Australian medicine to support overall well-being.
